src/index.ts.summary: Package entrypoint: re-exports base/types and creates the default ofetch/$fetch instances bound to globalThis.fetch.
src/index.ts.outputs: Exported `fetch` wrapper, `ofetch` and `$fetch` $Fetch instances; re-exports base.ts and types.ts.
src/index.ts.should: Wrap global fetch, instantiate default client via createFetch, aggregate public API surface.
src/index.ts.shouldNot: Contain request logic, error normalization, URL/utils helpers, or type declarations.

src/base.ts.summary: Barrel module re-exporting the public symbols of fetch.ts (createFetch) and error.ts (FetchError, createFetchError).
src/base.ts.should: Aggregate and re-export the core fetch factory and error module surface.
src/base.ts.shouldNot: Contain request logic, error construction, or type definitions of its own.

src/error.ts.summary: FetchError class and createFetchError factory that builds a normalized error with lazy request/options/response/data/status getters from context.
src/error.ts.outputs: FetchError instance implementing IFetchError with descriptive message and defined getters.
src/error.ts.should: Format error message, attach cause, expose context-derived properties via getters.
src/error.ts.shouldNot: Perform fetching, retries, or response parsing.

src/utils.ts.summary: Fetch helper utilities: payload-method check, JSON-serializability detection, response-type detection from content-type, option/header merging, and hook invocation.
src/utils.ts.inputs: Values, content-type strings, request/options/defaults, hooks + context.
src/utils.ts.outputs: Booleans, ResponseType, ResolvedFetchOptions with merged Headers; awaits hooks.
src/utils.ts.should: Provide pure-ish predicates and option resolution; run hooks sequentially.
src/utils.ts.shouldNot: Perform network requests, build URLs, or define public API types.

src/utils.url.ts.summary: URL manipulation helpers: joinURL, withBase, and withQuery for appending/merging query parameters with normalization.
src/utils.url.ts.should: Join paths avoiding double slashes, prefix base, serialize query params, drop undefined values.
src/utils.url.ts.shouldNot: Perform network I/O, touch fetch options, or handle responses.

src/types.ts.summary: TypeScript type/interface declarations for the fetch API: $Fetch, FetchOptions, hooks, context, response/error, and response-type mappings.
src/types.ts.should: Declare the public and internal type contracts consumed across modules.

src/fetch.ts.summary: Core factory createFetch producing a $Fetch client with retry, timeout, body serialization, response parsing, hooks, and raw/native/create methods.
src/fetch.ts.inputs: CreateFetchOptions (fetch impl, defaults); per-call request + FetchOptions.
src/fetch.ts.should: Orchestrate request lifecycle, apply retries/timeouts, serialize bodies, parse responses, invoke hooks, throw normalized errors.
src/fetch.ts.shouldNot: Define types, build URLs directly (delegates utils.url), or construct FetchError itself (delegates error.ts).
